# Warrior
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Warrior&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The warrior wears strong armor and uses his magic helmet to inspire his allies in battle.
| weaponSlot = Sword
| weapon = Short Sword
| abilitySlot = Helm
| ability = Combat Helm
| armor = HeavyArmor
| armorLink = Heavy Armors

| hpStart = 250
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 855

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 252

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 75

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 30

| spdStart = 7
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 50

| dexStart = 10
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 50

| vitStart = 10
| vitLevel = 1 - 2
| vitCap = 75

| wisStart = 10
| wisLevel = 0 - 2
| wisCap = 50
}}
